title: Dishmatic Green General-Purpose Washing-Up Sponge Refill Heads with Antibacterial Abrasive – Kitchen Washing-Up Handle Refills – Pack of 6
features: DISHMATIC GENERAL PURPOSE REFILLS — great for general-purpose washing-up, use our refill heads with your Dishmatic handles! Each general-purpose refill features a green antibacterial abrasive layer!

YOUR LOVABLE DISH FRIEND — with a range of replaceable sponge heads for fast and effective washing-up, Dishmatic is your lovable dish friend! All Dishmatic refill heads are interchangeable to make light work of a range of tasks!

KIND TO HANDS — Dishmatic takes care of the hard work to help protect your skin and nails! Use a Dishmatic Handle to help you tackle hard-to-reach corners and enjoy a more comfortable scrubbing experience!

JUST CLICK & SLIDE — when your old sponge head wears out, remove it by simply clicking and sliding it off, and replace it with a new refill. All Dishmatic refill sponge, brush and scourer heads are interchangeable!
MADE IN THE UK — we are proud to support UK manufacturing! All our dish friends are manufactured and assembled in the UK, with a commitment to quality, innovation and responsible product development
